data.name: Bang Banger! Aim Trainer
data.detailed_description:
Bang Banger! Aim Trainer is an erotic aim-training game where your performance unlocks much more than just points. Choose between the sensual world of HENTAI, the grandeur of FUTA, or the intensity of BARA and get ready to aim with precision and pleasure.

Whether you want to sharpen your reflexes or simply have fun with interactive adult content, each match offers exciting challenges with dynamic targets, increasing difficulty levels, and ever hotter visual rewards.

Here, hitting the target comes with a special thrill: unlock exclusive images as your aim improves. All with a stylized look, suggestive sounds, and the freedom to play at your own pace.

Features

  • Three distinct adult themes: HENTAI, FUTA, and BARA, choose what satisfies you most!

  • After your first choice, the game will not show the other options on the start screen (only in the options menu).

  • Aim training system with real-time feedback and erotic progression.

  • Unlockable gallery with provocative visual rewards.

  • Responsive controls and varied training modes.

  • An adult experience focused on both pleasure and precision.

If you like to aim… and climax… Bang Banger! is the perfect place to sharpen all your skills.

data.short_description: Your precision fuels the pleasure. Select your preferred thrill and face fast-paced challenges that reward your reflexes with ever-hotter seductive surprises.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 韓文, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Core I3
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Core I5
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any

  • 音效卡: Any
